'''Da'nor''', also known as '''Planet X''', was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Delantine system/Legends|Delantine system]], near [[Romm]]. It [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] three [[Star/Legends|stars]] and thus went through four seasonal changes each day. [[Stuart Zissu]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], [[4B-X]], and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] crashed on the planet in [[Escape pod 4]]. They were rescued from the planet by [[Granit]]. From Da'nor, Stuart was ordered to go to [[Romm]]. The language [[N'or]] was spoken on the planet. It was homeworld to large predatory birds and [[Unidentified flying lizard|flying lizards]].

==Native species==
===Predatory birds===
They were almost as big as [[Bonegnawer/Legends|bonegnawers]] and produce a "caw" call. Major traits included a long, thin beak and large claws. Migrating north in the spring and south in the winter, they often bickered over food.

===Succulent plant===
They had tough skin to keep water in. Inside of their leaves was water and a fruit edible to Humans and the giant flies of the planet.

===Huge fly===
This creature was the size of a young Human's hand and enjoyed the water inside tough succulents.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Science Adventures: Emergency in Escape Pod Four]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars Science Adventures: Journey Across Planet X]]'' {{1stID|Da'nor}}
